Title: Phase 2 - Setup EDA notebook structure
Description: Create EDA sections and narrative cells for application and behavioral analyses.

Title: Phase 2 - Profile application dataset
Description: Run profiling for schema, types, missingness, cardinality, and class balance.

Title: Phase 2 - Profile application - missingness report
Description: Create column-wise missingness report and flag high-missing columns.

Title: Phase 2 - Profile application - categorical cardinality
Description: List high-cardinality categorical features and recommend encoding strategy.

Title: Phase 2 - Analyze behavioral dataset
Description: Inspect pedidos distributions (valor, atraso, frequência) and detect anomalies/outliers.

Title: Phase 2 - Behavioral - outlier handling plan
Description: Define rules for outlier detection and handling for order `valor` and `atraso`.

Title: Phase 2 - Build core EDA charts - idade_cnpj
Description: Plot default rate by idade_cnpj intervals and summarize trend.

Title: Phase 2 - Build core EDA charts - segmento & UF
Description: Compare inadimplencia by segmento_cliente and uf (heatmap & bar plots).

Title: Phase 2 - Build core EDA charts - Serasa & Platforms
Description: Charts for negativacoes/protestos and iFood/Google presence vs default.

Title: Phase 2 - Write EDA findings summary
Description: Document key hypotheses, validated patterns, and risks for modeling.

Title: Phase 3 - Engineer application features
Description: Implement preprocessing: null handling, categorical encoding, interval midpoint conversion, boolean indicators.

Title: Phase 3 - Parse and decompose CNAE
Description: Create CNAE division/group/class/subclass features from cnae_codigo.

Title: Phase 3 - Create credores-derived features
Description: Build features from credores list (count, diversity, sector frequency).

Title: Phase 3 - Build behavioral aggregates - value stats
Description: Aggregate pedidos by cliente: min, max, mean, median, std of `valor`.

Title: Phase 3 - Build behavioral aggregates - delay stats
Description: Aggregate pedidos by cliente: mean/max `atraso`, % delayed, delay frequency.

Title: Phase 3 - Build behavioral aggregates - recency & frequency
Description: Compute recency (days since last order) and orders per month for each cliente.

Title: Phase 3 - Validate leakage constraints
Description: Guarantee no temporal leakage in behavioral features and joins.

Title: Phase 4 - Train logistic baseline (application)
Description: Train baseline logistic regression with proper preprocessing pipeline and stratified split.

Title: Phase 4 - Train tree models (application)
Description: Train Random Forest and XGBoost for application model and compare against baseline.

Title: Phase 4 - Hyperparameter tuning (application)
Description: Run randomized/grid search for best application model and capture experiment settings.

Title: Phase 4 - Evaluate and persist best model
Description: Generate ROC/PR/confusion matrix and save best application model artifact.

Title: Phase 4 - Prepare model inferencing script
Description: Write `predict_application_risk.py` to load model and produce scores from new client data.

Title: Phase 5 - Train behavioral baseline
Description: Train logistic baseline on combined application + behavioral feature set.

Title: Phase 5 - Train behavioral advanced models
Description: Train Random Forest/XGBoost behavioral models and compare against baseline.

Title: Phase 5 - Evaluate behavioral feature impact
Description: Identify strongest behavioral predictors and contrast with application predictors.

Title: Phase 6 - Benchmark all candidates
Description: Create single comparison table with ROC-AUC, precision, recall, F1 across all models.

Title: Phase 6 - Select champion model strategy
Description: Define decision criteria for final model selection and deployment readiness.

Title: Phase 7 - Global interpretability analysis
Description: Compute permutation importance and SHAP global summaries for selected models.

Title: Phase 7 - Local explanation cases - examples
Description: Select 10 representative clients and save SHAP explanations for each.

Title: Phase 7 - Local explanation cases - automated report
Description: Generate a small notebook that visualizes local explanations for selected cases.

Title: Phase 7 - Interpretability governance review
Description: Assess potential bias/proxy variables and document limitations/failure modes.

Title: Phase 7 - Interpretability - feature stability
Description: Check feature distributions and SHAP stability across train/test and segments.

Title: Phase 8 - Define credit policy thresholds
Description: Design approval/denial/review bands based on risk score and business trade-offs.

Title: Phase 8 - Design recurring-client policy
Description: Define how behavioral risk updates limits and cadence of reassessment.

Title: Phase 8 - Run scenario impact analysis
Description: Estimate approval rate, expected loss, and portfolio risk under candidate thresholds.

Title: Phase 8 - Final recommendation memo
Description: Produce final write-up with model choice, interpretability evidence, and policy proposal.
